creator: karels@freebsd.org
text: Any additional thoughts on this?  I rebooted with my UPS disconnected, and I still get constant messages about device vanished.  Then I rebooted with *no* external USB devices connected, and I *still* get these messages immediately and constantly.  I never saw this with 11.3, and I may have to revert to it.  I'm happy to run experiments to test any theories.
